arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ خُصَّ اَنْتَ اَوَّلَ ظَالِمٍ بِٱللَّعْنِ مِنِّي
english translation text: O Allah, pour special curses on the foremost persecutor
and then pour curses on the second, the third, and the fourth.

arabic text: وَٱلْعَنْ عُبَيْدَ ٱللَّهِ بْنَ زِيَادٍ وَٱبْنَ مَرْجَانَةَ
english translation text: and curse `Ubaydullah ibn Ziyad, the son of Marjanah,

arabic text: وَآلَ اَبِي سُفْيَانَ وَآلَ زِيَادٍ وَآلَ مَرْوَانَ
english translation text: the family of Abu-Sufyan, the family of Ziyad, and the family of Marwan
